I Speaking as The Computer 
You should develop a Computer voice,” a ‘mode of speech that, when used, instantly in- forms your players that you are speaking as The Computer. Different GMs have slightly dif- ferent Computer voices. Here are some suggestions: ‘Speak as.melodiously, calmly and sweetly as you can. Think of a mommy talking to her Children (when they're being good).
